attentionItems.headline: Queued work is blocked
attentionItems.detail: 3 queued entries exist while consumer threads are 0.
attentionItems.action: Raise consumer threads or switch the lane back to sync mode.

attentionItems.headline: Failures detected
attentionItems.action: Inspect the last error, then replay or clear failed buffer entries.

attentionItems.headline: Async-capable lane is running inline
attentionItems.detail: This method can queue work but is currently executing in sync mode.
attentionItems.action: Keep sync if latency is acceptable, or move to async when buffering is required.
